headline: IMAAVY® (nipocalimab-aahu) shows over two years of sustained disease control in a broad population with generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG)
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) today announced new data from the Phase 3 Vivacity-MG3 study and ongoing open label extension (OLE) in a broad population of antibody-positive (including anti-AChR+a and anti-MuSK+b) adults with generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG) reinforcing the efficacy, sustained disease control and proven safety profile of IMAAVY® (nipocalimab-aahu). These data are among the seven abstracts Johnson & Johnson is presenting at the American Academy of Neurology (AAN) 2026 Meeting i

headline: Johnson & Johnson’s AI Cardiac Tools Add Detail To Valuation Story
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) introduced the AI powered CARTOSOUND SONATA Module for cardiac arrhythmia care at the Heart Rhythm Society 2026 meeting. The new module integrates artificial intelligence with ultrasound catheter technology to support imaging and mapping in electrophysiology procedures. J&J also presented new clinical data on its VARIPULSE Platform for atrial fibrillation treatment, expanding its electrophysiology portfolio. For investors tracking Johnson & Johnson at a share...
